title: US unemployment rate >= 10% at end of 2027
question_text: Will the US headline unemployment rate (BLS U-3, seasonally adjusted) for December 2027 be >= 10.0%?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the US headline unemployment rate (BLS U-3, seasonally adjusted) for December 2027 - as first published in the BLS Employment Situation release (~early January 2028) - is 10.0% or higher. Resolves NO otherwise. This is a point-in-time reading for December 2027, NOT whether any month during 2027 reached 10%.
resolution_source: BLS Employment Situation, U-3 seasonally-adjusted headline rate, December 2027 (as first published)
edge_cases: Use the headline U-3 SA figure as first published for December 2027. If a government shutdown or data disruption delays the December print, use the nearest available month's SA U-3. Trend series and later revisions are not used. Broader measures (U-6) do not count.
